Game: Spider-Man 2001-04-20T00:00:00-07:00 Spider-Man is the first 3D game to star the popular web-slinger. It is loosely based on Spider-Man: The Animated Series and Spider-Man Unlimited and features some of the voice cast from each and similar character designs. Peter Parker is attending a demonstration of the reformed Dr. Otto Octavius's new invention when an imposter Spider-Man steals the device. Spider-Man must work to clear his name and uncover the sinister motives behind the device's theft. xFgWBHEZB-c http://images.launchbox-app.com/706ffd99-c913-4076-aa2b-c8329f8d047b.jpg <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/74c10383-f6c0-4d99-9760-6539e2cf3091.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/e7dec245-bd01-4ac0-a6fc-8cc7df1a6643.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/98df1f0e-2c6e-4b32-9f9c-a2a292cc3d69.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/d3ff4fd5-6a30-40ba-a358-8b1b9a80c378.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/00d1d7c4-c7bb-4c68-a2d1-971f21aee17b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/4a6f401c-94f7-4d79-a423-dcd1adc5197e.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/3881ac5b-ea3a-4556-97b7-db897ec7215e.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/90f5df73-95bb-49d0-804d-4298b7048100.png 4.125 E - Everyone Action Neversoft Entertainment, Inc.
